## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed off all my commits with `git commit -s` (DCO required — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin-dco))
- [ ] My code follows the project style (`ruff check .` passes)
- [ ] I have added tests covering my changes (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] My commits have meaningful messages (Conventional Commits style preferred)
